title: Delhi High Court restrains trademark infringement of Stand Up sexual wellness capsules
description: The Delhi High Court recently passed an interim order restraining the infringement of the ‘Stand Up’ trademark used by health-tech firm PSTGems for its sexual wellness capsules.Justice Tushar Rao Gedela passed the order on April 30 after noting that a company named Brahmastra Pharmacy was flagrantly infringing the registered trademarks.“At this stage, this Court is of the considered opinion that the label of the defendants containing the mark ‘STAND UP’ with the two hearts in
